title: Gluttony suppresses other Hit Modifier and Hit Dice increases

card.rawText: When summoned, destroy all magic cards on the field. For each magic card destroyed, add +1 Modifier to this card. This card is unaffected by other Hit Modifier and Hit Dice Roll increases.

effect.value: Unaffected by other Hit Modifier and Hit Dice Roll increases

plan.title: Gluttony suppresses other Hit Modifier and Hit Dice increases
plan.summary: Place Gluttony with positive Hit Modifier and Hit Dice Roll equip buffs and verify those other increases are ignored.

notes: Do not summon Gluttony in this fixture; set it directly as the primary creature so the separate destroy-all-magic trigger does not remove the test buff cards.
Pre-place The Career Buccaneer and Warming Glow as field magic equipped to Gluttony.
The Career Buccaneer would normally add Modifier +6, and Warming Glow would normally add Hit Dice Rolls +1.
Gluttony's own base Modifier is 0, and this fixture does not destroy magic for its separate +1-per-destroyed-magic clause.

steps: Set Gluttony as player_1 primary creature.
Equip The Career Buccaneer and Warming Glow to Gluttony.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect Gluttony's effective Modifier and hit roll dice count.

expectedAssertions.label: Other positive Modifier increase is suppressed
Other positive Hit Dice Roll increase is suppressed
The Career Buccaneer remains equipped/on field

manualVerification: Confirm Gluttony's own +1 Modifier per destroyed magic still applies separately.
riskNotes: This fixture isolates suppression of other positive Hit Modifier and Hit Dice Roll increases.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Gluttony's immunity to other Hit Modifier and Hit Dice Roll increases.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
